prompt: Create a vertical 4:5 cinematic lifestyle editorial poster featuring a young East Asian woman with long wavy black hair sitting sideways on a simple wooden chair in a cozy vintage attic bedroom studio. She is barefoot, with knees drawn up elegantly, wearing a sheer fitted white short-sleeve top over a dark camisole strap and a loose blue-and-white striped skirt. She quietly measures herself with a yellow tailor measuring tape, holding one end near her chest and the other in her hand, looking down with a calm, slightly pensive expression. The room is softly cluttered and intimate: a rumpled bed and photo-covered wall behind her, a large framed misty blue forest print, a pendant lamp overhead, tall old windows glowing with cool daylight on the right, stacked books and boxes, a wooden table with an open notebook, pen, ceramic bowl, and exactly 2 apples, plus a small black stove/fireplace glowing orange at the lower left. Use moody blue-gray natural window light mixed with warm firelight, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, film-grain softness, romantic melancholy atmosphere, high-fashion magazine composition, muted colors, and delicate highlights on hair and fabric. Add exactly 5 red-brown typography overlays in elegant thin italic calligraphy and small serif captions: 1) large script across the upper left/top reading soft bloom; 2) small circled text at left middle reading "inner light"; 3) large script at lower left reading romance with tiny uppercase subtitle "LIVE IN THE MOMENT"; 4) small uppercase text near the window on the right reading "MOONLIT HEART"; 5) lower right script reading "born of light" with tiny uppercase paragraph text below: "SHE CARRIES THE GENTLE GLOW OF MORNING AND THE QUIET HEAT OF MIDNIGHT." Keep all text understated, partially transparent, and integrated like an art-book fashion spread. Avoid extra people, extra limbs, distorted anatomy, garish colors, or modern smartphone elements.
